content: 2026 standard for small React SPA dashboards: Vite (React team's official CRA replacement) + React 19 + TypeScript. Vite scaffolds via 'npm create vite@latest -- --template react-ts'. No router/auth backend needed for a single-view dashboard; state can be plain useState/URL params rather than heavier state libs. React 19's compiler reduces need for manual memoization.
